canonical_definition: A variant of the Spider benchmark where schema-related words in the questions are replaced with their synonyms to test model robustness to lexical variation.
papers: EPO: Explicit Policy Optimization for Strategic Reasoning inLLMs via Reinforcement Learning
KatFishNet: DetectingLLM-GeneratedKorean Text through Linguistic Feature Analysis
